title: Vegan Tunisian Stew
description: A hearty, flavorful stew originating from the Mediterranean region, made vegan with the use of vegetables and plant-based ingredients.

ingredients.name: Energizing
ingredients.notes: Unknown ingredient, assuming it's a flavor enhancer

ingredients.name: Hot
ingredients.notes: Unknown ingredient, assuming it's a spice

ingredients.name: Cheese
ingredients.notes: Not suitable for a vegan dish, omitting it

ingredients.name: R
ingredients.notes: Unknown ingredient, assuming it's a flavor enhancer

instructions: Heat oil in the pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped vegetables and cook until tender.
Add the non-dairy cream and stir to combine.
Add the spices and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Transfer the stew to the vessel and serve.
